transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I had a surgery at Sunrise last month. I want to file a reimbursement claim because I paid out of pocket. Can you help with the documents?
AGENT: Of course. For reimbursement claims, you'll need the original discharge summary, itemised bills, all prescriptions, and your insurance policy details.
CALLER: I have most of those. Can I get a duplicate discharge summary from you if I've lost the original?
AGENT: Yes, you can request a duplicate discharge summary from our medical records department. Please visit in person with your patient ID and a valid ID proof. It usually takes 2 working days.
CALLER: That's helpful. And you'll provide all the itemised bills too?
AGENT: Yes, our billing department can provide itemised bill copies. Please bring your invoice number or patient ID when you come. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, I think that covers it. Thank you.
